creator: rometravelers
caption:
One sunset in Rome and suddenly nothing else compares by @iampcast 🌅Send this to your favorite traveling partner! ❤️

💡 The warm golden color seen around Rome comes from travertine stone, the same material used in landmarks like the Colosseum and Trevi Fountain.
